title: Added official Tutorial 4 solutions
items: Reconciled Tutorial 4 Questions 1-7 against the official eight-page solution PDF.
Preserved official solution transcriptions and added separate MathJax-formatted explanations.
Corrected the Question 2 explanation to use the official sample-variance denominator n-1.
Flagged the incomplete Question 1 orthogonality sentence and the reversed MPG interpretation in Question 5.
Kept the Tutorial 4 exam answer provisional because the official file repeats the question but provides no solution.

title: Improved math and clarified churn EDA
items: Reformatted long equations for narrow screens and converted raw PCA notation into MathJax.
Expanded the correlated-normal example with its construction, variance, covariance, eigenvectors, and independence caveat.
Rebuilt the churn lesson from raw counts through conditional rates, effect-size interpretation, and causal limitations.
Added denominator traps, new active-recall prompts and flashcards, and clearer interpretation text in the churn Visual Lab.

title: Audited Part 2 source fidelity
items: Changed official question solutions to show the source transcription first, with formatted math and tables as a secondary view.
Flagged the Tutorial 4 exam mismatch between the printed variance of X2 and the variance calculated from its data table.
Clarified that the interactive photo-compression variants use a downscaled browser copy while following the course's full-resolution PCA method.
Reworked the houses loading chart so all variable labels remain distinct and readable.
Added source notes for the row-versus-column matrix rotation mismatch and the ordinary-versus-partial correlation terminology.

title: Added complete Part 2 PCA coverage
items: Added detailed PCA guide chapters covering geometry, covariance, eigenvector optimization, explained variance, houses, and photo compression.
Added every Tutorial 3 and Tutorial 4 question, preserving Tutorial 3 official solutions where supplied and marking all unreleased solutions provisional.
Added Part 2 flashcards, Exam Kit formulas and derivations, interactive PCA labs, verified houses results, photo reconstructions, source audits, and all five supplied videos.

title: Reconciled Tutorial 2 exercise solutions
items: Added Part1/Tutorial 2 Solutions.pdf as an official source for Tutorial 2 Exercises 1-5.
Updated Tutorial 2 exercise solutions from unofficial to official while keeping explanations separate.
Added source-audit notes for the table-count mismatch, the lower-tail inequality typo, and the lognormal simulation-size mismatch.

title: Reconciled Tutorial 1 official solutions
items: Added Part1/Tutorial 1 Solutions.pdf as an official source.
Updated Tutorial 1 question-bank solutions from unofficial to official while keeping explanations separate.
Added a source-audit note for the Tutorial 1 Q4 mean(Data.New) versus mean(Data) wording mismatch.

title: Upgraded flashcards
items: Removed the Exam Kit Answer Frames section and answer-frame data from the Exam Kit model.
Rebuilt Flashcards into an Anki-style deck workspace with deck selection, custom sets, search, filters, marking, suspending, resetting, and selected-card review.
Added custom flashcard sets and card flags to homepage progress backup export/import.

title: Cleaned homepage and question bank
items: Renamed the homepage hero to Intro To Data Science and simplified the current coverage section.
Removed the standalone changelog page, homepage next-actions/source audit/source verification panels, and the homepage changelog card.
Removed the question-bank practice overlay and adjusted source stat cards so labels fit cleanly.

title: Added guide active recall
items: Added source-linked active-recall checkpoints to every Part 1 study-guide topic.
Checkpoint answers stay hidden until reveal and can be marked Got it or Revisit.
Added checkpoint progress to the homepage dashboard, next-study actions, and progress backup export/import.

title: Added Exam Kit derivations
items: Added a source-linked Derivation Coach for key Part 1 formulas.
Derivation cards keep proof steps hidden until reveal and can be marked understood once reproducible from memory.
Added derivation progress to the homepage dashboard, next-study actions, and progress backup export/import.

title: Added Exam Kit missed recall
items: Added a missed-recall queue to the Exam Kit for formula and R command drill prompts.
Prompts rated as missed now stay in a focused weak-spots drill until recalled correctly.
Added missed-recall counts to the homepage progress dashboard, next-study actions, and progress backup export/import.

title: Added question mistake notes
items: Added per-question mistake notes to the question bank and practice mode.
Added a notes filter and source-card note counts so saved traps can be isolated for review.
Included question notes in the homepage progress dashboard, next-study actions, and progress backup export/import.

title: Added guide search filters
items: Added search across study-guide topic titles, explanations, formulas, traps, R code, and source labels.
Added guide status filtering for reviewed, revisit, and unreviewed topics.
Filtered guide topics also update the sidebar and visible-topic count.

title: Added question source summaries
items: Added source-level summary cards to the question bank showing official/provisional solution coverage.
Each source card now shows question count, completed count, and revisit count from saved progress.
Source cards can apply a source filter or launch practice mode directly for that sheet.

title: Added progress backup controls
items: Added a homepage Progress Backup panel for exporting and importing browser-saved study state.
Backup files include guide status, question progress, practice history, flashcards, Exam Kit checklist, and drill history.
Added a guarded clear-progress action for resetting local study state in the current browser.

title: Added Exam Kit recall drills
items: Added Formula, R command, and Mixed recall drills to the Exam Kit.
Drill answers stay hidden until reveal and rating buttons save recent session summaries locally.
Keyboard support includes Space to reveal/hide and Escape to exit.

title: Added R command clinic
items: Added source-linked R command cards to the Exam Kit for missing values, outliers, summaries, transformations, and churn EDA.
Each command card now pairs syntax with an exam-use explanation and a common trap.
Updated the Exam Kit snapshot to include R command coverage.

title: Added next-study recommendations
items: Added a homepage Next Study Actions panel driven by guide topic status, question revisit flags, flashcard due state, and Exam Kit checklist progress.
Recommendations link directly into the relevant guide topic, question, flashcard deck, or Exam Kit page.
Kept the panel localStorage-only so it remains GitHub Pages friendly.

title: Added Part 1 exam kit
items: Added a new Exam Kit page with formula triggers, answer frames, source-linked traps, and a mastery checklist.
Linked the Exam Kit from the homepage and global navigation.
Kept all exam-kit content tied to current Part 1 local sources and provisional-solution status.

title: Added guide topic progress
items: Added Reviewed and Revisit controls to every study-guide topic.
Saved guide topic status in localStorage under ids_guide_topic_status.
Added guide-topic review and revisit counts to the homepage progress dashboard.

title: Added question source filtering
items: Added a dedicated source dropdown to the question bank for Tutorial 0, Tutorial 1, Tutorial 2 exercises, and Tutorial 2 exam questions.
Practice mode now inherits the selected source filter because it starts from the same filtered question set.
Added source-group badges to each question so the origin remains visible while studying.

title: Added source verification matrix
items: Added a homepage Source Verification panel showing which course files are incorporated, official, provisional, linked, or pending.
Moved the source inventory into reusable data so future sessions can update verification status alongside content.
Made the pending Tutorial 1/2 official-solution reconciliation visible to the student.

title: Added homepage progress dashboard
items: Homepage now summarizes completed questions, revisit flags, reviewed flashcards, due flashcards, and official-solution coverage.
Progress reads from the existing localStorage keys used by the question bank and flashcards.
The dashboard refreshes periodically and listens for storage updates from other tabs.

title: Expanded flashcard deck
items: Added high-yield Part 1 cards for CRISP-DM, missing values, outliers, summaries, transformations, and churn EDA.
Appended new cards after the existing deck so saved SRS card IDs are not shifted.
Covered tutorial formula triggers such as missing-value probability, variance ratio, normal IQR, and lognormal mean/median.

title: Improved Tutorial 1/2 source fidelity
items: Rendered and checked Tutorial 1 and Tutorial 2 question PDFs.
Added source-style R code blocks for Tutorial 1 Questions 3, 4, and 5.
Expanded Tutorial 2 Question 5 to include every source subpart and displayed formulas.

title: Made homepage changelog live
items: Homepage changelog now polls changelog.json while the page is open.
The homepage redraws the visible changelog entries only when the latest entries change.
Kept the existing version polling refresh alert for deployed file updates.

title: Added course-data churn visuals
items: Added a Visual Lab panel backed by summary statistics extracted from Part1/churn.txt.
Recreated the R script's Intl.Plan vs Churn conditional-probability view.
Added Eve.Charge boxplot summaries by Churn group for the course EDA example.
Fixed the scaling lab sample generator so the raw y-standard-deviation metric renders correctly.

title: Improved official solution fidelity
items: Rendered Tutorial 0 Question 5's official CRISP-DM answer as a source-style table.
Added official-solution HTML support so future PDF tables can stay visually faithful.
Visually checked the Tutorial 0 official solution PDF pages during the source audit.

title: Added question practice mode
items: Added an exam-style practice overlay to the question bank.
Practice mode uses the current filters, shuffles the selected questions, and keeps solutions hidden until revealed.
Added timer, session progress, done/revisit marking, and recent session history storage.

title: Improved question source fidelity
items: Added source-style table rendering in the question bank.
Restored table layout for Tutorial 0 Question 4.
Restored table layout for Tutorial 2 Exercise 1 and Exercise 2 while keeping search/filter text available.

title: Added interactive visual lab
items: Added a Visuals page with deterministic canvas graphs for Part 1 concepts.
Added interactive controls for missing-value imputation, boxplot fences, lognormal skew, and scaling before distance models.
Added the Visuals page to the shared navigation and homepage cards.

title: Added source audit notes
items: Added visible source-audit notes on the homepage and study guide.
Flagged the Tutorial 2 Exercise 1 table-count mismatch: caption says 6 observations, table lists 7.
Flagged Tutorial 0 Question 3 official-solution formatting ambiguity while preserving the official wording.

title: Added full-course roadmap
items: Added homepage roadmap cards for Part 1, Part 2, and Part 3.
Marked Part 2 PCA and Part 3 machine learning materials as coming soon until source files are available.
Updated the handoff rules so future sessions keep deferred parts visible and source-gated.

title: Initial Part 1 build
items: Built GitHub Pages-ready static site in docs/.
Added detailed Part 1 study guide from slides, tutorials, R code, and datasets.
Added Tutorial 0 official solutions exactly as sourced, plus separate explanations.
Added provisional Tutorial 1 and 2 solutions marked unofficial until official PDFs are released.
Added MathJax math rendering, diagrams, flashcards, progress tracking, and live update polling.
